children.name: Alatina
children.description: Alatina — a genus of alatinid box jellyfish in the family Alatinidae.

children.name: Alatina alata
children.description: Alatina alata (Reynaud, 1830), often called a sea wasp, is a species of box jellyfish found in the Pacific, Indian and Atlantic Oceans and in the Caribbean and Arabian Sea..

children.name: Alatina grandis
children.description: Alatina grandis is the largest known species in the genus Alatina, with specimens reaching up to 230 mm in bell height..

children.name: Alatina madraspatana
children.description: Alatina madraspatana — a species in the genus Alatina, family Alatinidae. Also known as alatinid box jellyfish.

children.name: Alatina morandinii
children.description: Alatina morandinii — a species in the genus Alatina, family Alatinidae. Also known as alatinid box jellyfish.

children.name: Alatina pyramis
children.description: Alatina pyramis — a species in the genus Alatina, family Alatinidae. Also known as alatinid box jellyfish.

children.name: Alatina rainensis
children.description: Alatina rainensis — a species in the genus Alatina, family Alatinidae. Also known as alatinid box jellyfish.

children.name: Alatina tetraptera
children.description: Alatina tetraptera — a species in the genus Alatina, family Alatinidae. Also known as alatinid box jellyfish.

children.name: Manokia
children.description: Manokia — a genus of alatinid box jellyfish in the family Alatinidae.

children.name: Manokia stiasnyi
children.description: Manokia is a genus of box jellyfish in the Alatinidae family..

children.name: Keesingia
children.description: Keesingia — a genus of alatinid box jellyfish in the family Alatinidae.

children.name: Keesingia gigas
children.description: Keesingia gigas, the "giant" (Greek gigas) Keesingia, is one of two new species of Irukandji jellyfish, the only one of the genus Keesingia in the Alatinid family..
